# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent istio egress unrestricted.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
  annotations:
    description: "Payment gateway API - PCI DSS compliant egress"
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.payment-gateway.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https-payment
    protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - payment-service
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
  annotations:
    description: "Analytics third-party API egress"
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.analytics-provider.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https-analytics
    protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - analytics-service
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-notification-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
  annotations:
    description: "Notification service (email/SMS) egress"
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.notification-service.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https-notification
    protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - notification-service
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
  annotations:
    description: "Managed PostgreSQL primary instance - TLS enforced"
spec:
  hosts:
  - primary.postgres.database.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp-postgres-tls
    protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - data-service
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-replica
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
  annotations:
    description: "Managed PostgreSQL read replica - TLS enforced"
spec:
  hosts:
  - replica.postgres.database.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp-postgres-tls
    protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - data-service
  - reporting-service
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
  annotations:
    description: "Managed Redis cache cluster - TLS enforced"
spec:
  hosts:
  - cache.redis.database.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 6380
    name: tcp-redis-tls
    protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - cache-service
  - session-service
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-identity-provider
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
  annotations:
    description: "OAuth2/OIDC identity provider egress"
spec:
  hosts:
  - login.identity-provider.example.com
  - tokens.identity-provider.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https-identity
    protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - auth-service
---
# VirtualService for payment API with timeout, retries, and fault injection protection
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api-routing
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.payment-gateway.example.com
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - payment-service
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.payment-gateway.example.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.payment-gateway.example.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api-routing
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.analytics-provider.example.com
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - analytics-service
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.analytics-provider.example.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.analytics-provider.example.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
---

  namespace: istio-system

    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted

  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system

  tls:
  - match:

    route:

        host: api.notification-service.example.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-routing
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  hosts:
  - primary.postgres.database.example.com
  - replica.postgres.database.example.com
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - data-service
  - reporting-service
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
      sniHosts:
      - primary.postgres.database.example.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: primary.postgres.database.example.com
        port:
          number: 5432
      weight: 100
  - match:
    - port: 5432
      sniHosts:
      - replica.postgres.database.example.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: replica.postgres.database.example.com
        port:
          number: 5432
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-redis-routing
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  hosts:
  - cache.redis.database.example.com
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - cache-service
  - session-service
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 6380
      sniHosts:
      - cache.redis.database.example.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: cache.redis.database.example.com
        port:
          number: 6380
      weight: 100

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-identity-provider-routing
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  hosts:
  - login.identity-provider.example.com
  - tokens.identity-provider.example.com
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - auth-service
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - login.identity-provider.example.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: login.identity-provider.example.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - tokens.identity-provider.example.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: tokens.identity-provider.example.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
---
# DestinationRule for payment API - enforce mTLS and connection pool limits
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api-dest
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  host: api.payment-gateway.example.com
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - payment-service
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.payment-gateway.example.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 5s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 60s
          probes: 3
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DO_NOT_UPGRADE
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api-dest
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  host: api.analytics-provider.example.com
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - analytics-service
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.analytics-provider.example.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 30
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DO_NOT_UPGRADE
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-primary-dest
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  host: primary.postgres.database.example.com
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - data-service
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: primary.postgres.database.example.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 60s
          probes: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-replica-dest
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  host: replica.postgres.database.example.com
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - data-service
  - reporting-service
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: replica.postgres.database.example.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 150
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 60s
          probes: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache-dest
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  host: cache.redis.database.example.com
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - cache-service
  - session-service
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: cache.redis.database.example.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
        connectTimeout: 3s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 120s
          interval: 30s
          probes: 5
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 15s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-identity-provider-dest
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  host: login.identity-provider.example.com
  exportTo:
  - "."
  - istio-system
  - auth-service
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: login.identity-provider.example.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DO_NOT_UPGRADE
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
# Sidecar resource to enforce strict egress at namespace level
# Only allows egress to explicitly defined ServiceEntries
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: payment-service-sidecar
  namespace: payment-service
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: payment-service
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/api.payment-gateway.example.com"
    - "istio-system/*"
    - "payment-service/*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: analytics-service-sidecar
  namespace: analytics-service
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: analytics-service
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/api.analytics-provider.example.com"
    - "istio-system/*"
    - "analytics-service/*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: data-service-sidecar
  namespace: data-service
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: data-service
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/primary.postgres.database.example.com"
    - "istio-system/replica.postgres.database.example.com"
    - "istio-system/*"
    - "data-service/*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: cache-service-sidecar
  namespace: cache-service
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: cache-service
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/cache.redis.database.example.com"
    - "istio-system/*"
    - "cache-service/*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: auth-service-sidecar
  namespace: auth-service
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: auth-service
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/login.identity-provider.example.com"
    - "istio-system/tokens.identity-provider.example.com"
    - "istio-system/*"
    - "auth-service/*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: notification-service-sidecar
  namespace: notification-service
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: notification-service
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/api.notification-service.example.com"
    - "istio-system/*"
    - "notification-service/*"
---
# Default mesh-wide sidecar to block all unregistered egress
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-deny-external
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/*"
    - "./*"
---
# AuthorizationPolicy to restrict which workloads can reach external services
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-payment-egress
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        namespaces:
        - payment-service
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/payment-service/sa/payment-service-sa"
    to:
    - operation:
        hosts:
        - "api.payment-gateway.example.com"
        ports:
        - "443"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-analytics-egress
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        namespaces:
        - analytics-service
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/analytics-service/sa/analytics-service-sa"
    to:
    - operation:
        hosts:
        - "api.analytics-provider.example.com"
        ports:
        - "443"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-data-service-db-egress
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        namespaces:
        - data-service
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/data-service/sa/data-service-sa"
    to:
    - operation:
        hosts:
        - "primary.postgres.database.example.com"
        - "replica.postgres.database.example.com"
        ports:
        - "5432"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-reporting-replica-egress
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        namespaces:
        - reporting-service
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/reporting-service/sa/reporting-service-sa"
    to:
    - operation:
        hosts:
        - "replica.postgres.database.example.com"
        ports:
        - "5432"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-cache-egress
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        namespaces:
        - cache-service
        - session-service
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/cache-service/sa/cache-service-sa"
        - "cluster.local/ns/session-service/sa/session-service-sa"
    to:
    - operation:
        hosts:
        - "cache.redis.database.example.com"
        ports:
        - "6380"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-auth-identity-egress
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        namespaces:
        - auth-service
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/auth-service/sa/auth-service-sa"
    to:
    - operation:
        hosts:
        - "login.identity-provider.example.com"
        - "tokens.identity-provider.example.com"
        ports:
        - "443"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-notification-egress
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        namespaces:
        - notification-service
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/notification-service/sa/notification-service-sa"
    to:
    - operation:
        hosts:
        - "api.notification-service.example.com"
        ports:
        - "443"
---
# PeerAuthentication to enforce strict mTLS mesh-wide
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-strict-mtls
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
# Telemetry configuration for egress access logging
apiVersion: telemetry.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: Telemetry
metadata:
  name: egress-access-logging
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: mesh-admin
    security.istio.io/egress-policy: restricted
spec:
  accessLogging:
  - providers:
    - name: envoy
    filter:
      expression: "connection.requested_server_name != '' || request.url_path != ''"
